introSection: Voglwuide Sepp is a steel terrain roller coaster located at Rodel- und Freizeitparadies St. Englmar in Sankt Englmar, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders per train.

fullText:
Voglwuide Sepp is a steel terrain roller coaster located at Rodel- und Freizeitparadies St. Englmar in Sankt Englmar, Bavaria, Germany.



3 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders per train.
